rows.gap_type_rationale: Attio is built for startups but HubSpot owns the 'startup CRM' narrative in AI answers, despite Attio's product-market fit in that segment.
Attio content exists but AI default-routes 'CRM alternative' queries to Salesforce comparison pages rather than surfacing Attio as an alternative.
Very few 'migrate to Attio' articles exist compared to abundant HubSpot/Salesforce migration guides and documentation.
Attio has RevOps features but AI associates RevOps tooling with HubSpot Operations Hub rather than Attio's native capabilities.

classified_gaps.classification_rationale: Peec(supports) + Gemini(supports) + Tavily(unavailable) - 2 of 2 available methods support; 0 conflicts.
